name: TreeCheckboxItem
description:
A tree item that uses a checkbox for selection.
Renders a `<li>` element.

clickToExpand.description: If `true`, clicking the item toggles expansion when no `Tree.ItemExpansionTrigger` is used.

className.description:
CSS class applied to the element, or a function that
returns a class based on the component’s state.

style.detailedType:
| React.CSSProperties
| ((
    state: Tree.CheckboxItem.State,
  ) => CSSProperties | undefined)
| undefined

render.description:
Allows you to replace the component’s HTML element
with a different tag, or compose it with another component.

Accepts a `ReactElement` or a function that returns the element to render.
render.detailedType:
| ReactElement
| ((
    props: HTMLProps,
    state: Tree.CheckboxItem.State,
  ) => ReactElement)
